title: Maharay #4121
definition:
Maharai = "impetuous"

 1) an inhabitant of Netophah in the tribe of Judah and one of David's
    mighty warriors
nasbUsage:

 1) an inhabitant of Netophah in the tribe of Judah and one of David's
    mighty warriors

    NASB:  one of Davids heroes
